body:
- Create User model with `winRate` index for optimized leaderboard queries.
- Create Match and MatchReplay models matching `/api/matches` response structures.
- Create SavePoint model with strict Buff and Upgrade sub-schemas mapped from `buff.ts`.
- Create Achievement model for static system achievements.
- Ensure all schemas use English JSDoc comments per language conventions.
title: fix: setup complete mongoose schemas aligned with design docs
